name: Paneer Bhurji
instructions: Crumble paneer. Saute onion, ginger, tomato and spices; fold in paneer and cook 3-4 min. Garnish with coriander.

name: Masala Egg Bhurji
instructions: Saute onion and tomato, add beaten eggs and spices, scramble until just set.

name: Moong Dal Chilla
instructions: Grind soaked moong dal to a batter with spices. Spread thin on a hot tawa and cook both sides.

name: Besan Chilla
instructions: Whisk besan with water and spices into a batter; cook like a thin pancake on a tawa.

name: Vegetable Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs with chopped veggies and spices; cook into a fluffy omelette.

name: Boiled Egg Salad
instructions: Toss sliced boiled eggs with chopped salad veggies, lemon and pepper.

name: Ragi Dosa
instructions: Mix ragi flour into a thin batter; pour onto a hot tawa and crisp up. Calcium-rich.

name: Oats Vegetable Upma
instructions: Roast oats; temper mustard and veggies, add oats and water, cook until fluffy.

name: Sprouts Poha
instructions: Temper and saute onion, add rinsed poha, sprouts, peanuts and turmeric; finish with lemon.

name: Tofu Scramble
instructions: Crumble tofu; saute with onion, tomato and turmeric like bhurji.

name: Greek Yogurt Fruit Bowl
instructions: Top thick greek yogurt with fruit, chia and chopped almonds.

name: Ragi Porridge
instructions: Cook ragi flour with milk to a smooth porridge; sweeten lightly with jaggery.

name: Moong Sprout Salad
instructions: Toss sprouts with chopped veggies, lemon and chaat masala. Steam sprouts lightly if preferred.

name: Egg Veggie Muffins
instructions: Beat eggs with chopped veggies and cheese; bake in a muffin tray until set.

name: Paneer Uttapam
instructions: Pour batter, top with crumbled paneer and veggies, cook covered until golden.

name: Multigrain Veg Sandwich
instructions: Layer veggies, cheese and chutney between multigrain bread; grill lightly.

name: Dalia Vegetable Porridge
instructions: Pressure-cook roasted dalia with veggies and spices to a savoury porridge.

name: Besan Paneer Cheela Roll
instructions: Make a besan cheela, fill with seasoned paneer and veggies, and roll up.

name: Egg Paratha Roll
instructions: Cook a paratha, coat with beaten egg on the tawa, top with onion and roll.

name: Spinach Corn Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs with chopped spinach and corn; cook into an omelette and add cheese.

name: Mini Idli with Sambar
instructions: Steam mini idlis; serve with a vegetable sambar.

name: Methi Thepla
instructions: Knead flour with chopped methi and spices; roll and roast theplas. Pairs with curd.

name: Paneer Tikka Masala
instructions: Grill marinated paneer; simmer in a tomato-onion masala gravy.

name: Rajma Masala
instructions: Pressure-cook soaked rajma; simmer in onion-tomato masala until thick.

name: Chana Masala
instructions: Simmer boiled chickpeas in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.

name: Moong Dal Tadka
instructions: Cook moong dal; finish with a cumin, onion and garlic tadka.

name: No Onion No Garlic Dal
instructions: Cook toor dal; temper with cumin, ginger, hing and tomato (no onion/garlic).

name: Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch and puree spinach; cook with onion-garlic base and fold in paneer.

name: Jain Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch and puree spinach; cook with ginger and tomato (no onion/garlic) and fold in paneer.

name: Bhindi Masala
instructions: Saute okra with onion, tomato and dry spices until tender.

name: Lauki Chana Dal
instructions: Pressure-cook chana dal with diced lauki and a basic masala.

name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
instructions: Saute mixed vegetables in an onion-tomato gravy until just tender.

name: Tofu Veg Stir Fry
instructions: Pan-sear tofu; toss with crunchy veggies, ginger-garlic and a splash of soy.

name: Soya Chunk Curry
instructions: Boil soya chunks; simmer in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.

name: Egg Curry
instructions: Simmer boiled eggs in a rich onion-tomato masala gravy.

name: Cauliflower Rice Veg Pulao
instructions: Saute whole spices and veggies; add riced cauliflower and cook briefly for a low-carb pulao.

name: Cauliflower Veg Fried Rice
instructions: Stir-fry veggies on high heat, add riced cauliflower and soy; toss quickly.

name: Paneer Hakka Noodles (Whole Wheat)
instructions: Boil noodles; stir-fry veggies and paneer with soy and toss the noodles through.

name: Millet Penne with Paneer & Veggies
instructions: Cook millet penne; toss in a tomato-spinach sauce with sauteed paneer.

name: Rajgira Roti with Sabzi
instructions: Knead rajgira flour and roll rotis; serve with a simple no-onion sabzi. Calcium-rich.

name: Baingan Bharta
instructions: Mash roasted eggplant; cook with onion, garlic and tomato.

name: Light Punjabi Kadhi
instructions: Whisk curd and besan; simmer to a tangy kadhi with a cumin tadka (no onion/garlic).

name: Dal Palak
instructions: Cook dal with chopped spinach; finish with a cumin tadka.

name: Vegetable Sambar
instructions: Cook toor dal with vegetables, tamarind and sambar powder.

name: Light Curd Rice
instructions: Mix cooled rice with curd; temper with mustard, curry leaves and ginger.

name: Mushroom Masala
instructions: Saute mushrooms; simmer in an onion-tomato masala.

name: Jain Chole
instructions: Simmer boiled chickpeas in a tomato-ginger gravy (no onion/garlic).

name: Paneer Jalfrezi
instructions: Stir-fry paneer with peppers and onion in a quick tomato masala.

name: Grilled Paneer Salad
instructions: Grill paneer cubes; toss with crisp salad leaves and a lemon-olive dressing.

name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka
instructions: Marinate paneer and peppers in spiced yogurt; grill until charred.

name: Tandoori Veg Platter
instructions: Marinate mixed veggies in spiced yogurt; roast or grill.

name: Moong Dal Soup
instructions: Cook moong dal soft; blend lightly with ginger and cumin into a comforting soup.

name: Tomato Shorba
instructions: Simmer tomato with ginger and spices; strain into a light shorba.

name: Vegetable Clear Soup
instructions: Simmer chopped veggies with garlic and pepper in a light broth.

name: Paneer Stuffed Capsicum
instructions: Stuff capsicums with spiced crumbled paneer; roast until tender.

name: Egg Bhurji
instructions: Scramble eggs with onion, tomato and spices until soft-set.

name: Methi Paneer
instructions: Cook chopped methi with tomato and ginger; fold in paneer (no onion/garlic).

name: Bottle Gourd Soup
instructions: Cook lauki with ginger; blend smooth and season with cumin and pepper.

name: Tofu Broccoli Stir Fry
instructions: Sear tofu; stir-fry with broccoli and peppers in ginger-garlic and soy.

name: Veg Cauliflower Rice Bowl
instructions: Top sauteed cauliflower rice with spiced beans and veggies as a bowl.

name: Mixed Sprout Curry
instructions: Cook sprouts in a light onion-tomato gravy (usal style).

name: Spinach Paneer Soup
instructions: Blend cooked spinach with garlic; warm with milk and diced paneer.

name: Roasted Veg with Hung Curd Dip
instructions: Roast seasoned vegetables; serve with a herbed hung-curd dip.

name: Soya Keema
instructions: Cook rehydrated soya granules with peas in a spiced masala, keema-style.

name: Anda Masala
instructions: Simmer halved boiled eggs in a thick onion-tomato gravy.

name: Paneer Tikka Skewers (No Onion Garlic)
instructions: Marinate paneer in spiced yogurt with ginger (no onion/garlic); skewer and grill.

name: Vegetable Coconut Stew
instructions: Simmer vegetables in light coconut milk with ginger and curry leaves.

name: Dal with Sauteed Greens
instructions: Cook dal; serve with quick cumin-sauteed mixed greens (no onion/garlic).

name: Light Millet Khichdi
instructions: Pressure-cook millet and moong dal with veggies and cumin into a soft khichdi.

name: Cabbage Tofu Stir Fry
instructions: Stir-fry shredded cabbage and tofu with ginger-garlic and a dash of soy.

name: Paneer Shashlik
instructions: Skewer paneer and peppers; toss in a light tangy sauce and grill.

name: Baked Veg Manchurian
instructions: Bake veggie balls; toss in a light manchurian sauce.

name: Roasted Chana
instructions: Toss roasted chana with chaat masala and lemon.

name: Grilled Paneer Cubes
instructions: Pan-grill paneer cubes; sprinkle chaat masala and lemon.

name: Masala Boiled Eggs
instructions: Halve boiled eggs; season with chaat masala and pepper.

name: Greek Yogurt Cup
instructions: Stir a little honey and cinnamon into thick greek yogurt.

name: Mixed Nuts Handful
instructions: A small handful of mixed nuts.

name: Seasonal Fruit Bowl
instructions: Toss cut seasonal fruit with a pinch of chaat masala.

name: Sprout Chaat
instructions: Mix sprouts with chopped onion, tomato, lemon and chaat masala.

name: Veg Sticks with Hummus
instructions: Serve crunchy veg sticks with a scoop of hummus.

name: Masala Buttermilk
instructions: Whisk curd with water, roasted cumin and ginger into chilled chaas.

name: Cheese Cubes
instructions: Serve bite-size cheese cubes. A calcium-rich kid favourite.

name: Small Peanut Chikki
instructions: A small piece of peanut-jaggery chikki.

name: Roasted Makhana
instructions: Roast makhana in a little ghee with pepper until crisp.

name: Paneer Tikka Bites
instructions: Marinate paneer in spiced yogurt; pan-grill into quick bites.

name: Moong Dal Dhokla
instructions: Steam a fermented moong dal batter; temper with mustard seeds.

name: Banana with Peanut Butter
instructions: Slice a banana and top with a spoon of peanut butter.

name: Ragi Cookies
instructions: Bake simple ragi-jaggery cookies. Calcium-rich kid treat.

name: Microwave Masala Egg Cup
instructions: Beat egg with chopped veggies in a mug; microwave until set.

name: Apple with Almond Butter
instructions: Serve apple slices with almond butter and a dusting of cinnamon.

name: Phulka Roti
instructions: Knead a soft dough; roll thin and puff each phulka directly on the flame.

name: Tawa Roti
instructions: Roll whole wheat dough and cook on a tawa, brushing lightly with ghee.

name: Jowar Roti (Bhakri)
instructions: Knead jowar flour with hot water; pat into a round and roast. Gluten-free.

name: Bajra Roti
instructions: Pat bajra dough into a thick roti and roast on a tawa. Iron and calcium rich.

name: Missi Roti (No Onion Garlic)
instructions: Knead wheat and besan with ajwain and ginger; roll and roast. Higher protein bread.

name: Tandoori Roti
instructions: Roll a thick roti and bake in a hot oven or tandoor until charred in spots.

name: Multigrain Roti
instructions: Roll multigrain dough thin and roast on a tawa. Extra fibre.

name: Steamed Rice
instructions: Cook rice with water until fluffy. A small portion as an accompaniment.

name: Jeera Rice
instructions: Temper cumin in ghee and toss with cooked rice (no onion/garlic).

name: Steamed Brown Rice
instructions: Cook brown rice until tender. Higher fibre, lighter on carbs.

name: Light Veg Pulao
instructions: Saute whole spices, onion and veggies; add rice and cook to a light pulao.

name: Lemon Rice
instructions: Temper mustard, peanuts and curry leaves; toss with rice, turmeric and lemon.

name: Curd Rice
instructions: Mix soft rice with curd; temper with mustard, ginger and curry leaves. Calcium-rich.

name: Chicken Keema Bhurji
instructions: Saute onion and ginger-garlic; cook chicken keema with tomato and spices until dry.

name: Chicken Sausage Scramble
instructions: Pan-fry sliced chicken sausage with onion and peppers; season with pepper.

name: Home-Style Chicken Curry
instructions: Brown chicken; simmer in an onion-tomato masala until tender.

name: Pepper Chicken
instructions: Saute chicken with crushed pepper, onion and curry leaves until dry and coated.

name: Chicken Saag (Palak Chicken)
instructions: Cook chicken in a pureed spinach gravy with onion and ginger-garlic.

name: Chicken Veg Stir Fry
instructions: Stir-fry chicken strips with crunchy veggies, ginger-garlic and a splash of soy.

name: Chicken Keema Matar
instructions: Cook chicken keema with peas in a spiced onion-tomato masala.

name: Light Fish Curry
instructions: Simmer fish in a tangy onion-tomato gravy with tamarind and curry leaves.

name: Tawa Fish Fry
instructions: Marinate fish in spices and lemon; shallow-fry on a tawa with a light semolina crust.

name: Prawn Masala
instructions: Saute prawns briefly; simmer in a spiced onion-tomato masala.

name: Mutton Keema Matar
instructions: Cook mutton keema with peas in a rich onion-tomato masala.

name: Chicken Chettinad
instructions: Simmer chicken in a roasted-spice and coconut Chettinad masala.

name: Chicken Hakka Noodles (Whole Wheat)
instructions: Boil noodles; stir-fry chicken and veggies with soy and toss the noodles through.

name: Grilled Chicken Breast
instructions: Marinate chicken breast in garlic, herbs and lemon; grill until cooked through.

name: Tandoori Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in spiced yogurt overnight; roast or grill until charred.

name: Chicken Tikka
instructions: Skewer yogurt-marinated chicken with peppers; grill until smoky.

name: Light Butter Chicken
instructions: Simmer grilled chicken in a tomato-cashew gravy with a touch of butter and cream.

name: Methi Chicken
instructions: Cook chicken with fresh fenugreek leaves in an onion-tomato masala.

name: Chicken Clear Soup
instructions: Simmer shredded chicken and veggies with garlic and pepper in a light broth.

name: Fish Tikka
instructions: Marinate firm fish in spiced yogurt; grill on skewers until just cooked.

name: Tandoori Fish
instructions: Marinate fish steaks in spiced yogurt; roast in a hot oven until charred.

name: Lemon Herb Grilled Fish
instructions: Grill fish fillets brushed with lemon, garlic and herbs.

name: Garlic Prawn Stir Fry
instructions: Stir-fry prawns with lots of garlic and peppers; finish with a dash of soy.

name: Mutton Curry
instructions: Slow-cook mutton in an onion-tomato and yogurt masala until fork-tender.

name: Baked Chicken 65
instructions: Marinate chicken in spiced yogurt; bake until crisp and toss with curry leaves.

name: Masala Dosa
instructions: Crisp a dosa and fill with a no-onion potato masala. Serve with chutney.

name: Aloo Paratha with Curd
instructions: Stuff parathas with spiced potato; roast and serve with a bowl of curd.

name: Paneer Paratha
instructions: Stuff parathas with seasoned crumbled paneer; roast with a little ghee.

name: Mixed Veg Uttapam
instructions: Pour batter, top with chopped veggies and cook covered until golden.

name: Veg Paneer Frankie
instructions: Fill a roasted wrap with spiced paneer, onion and chutney; roll into a frankie.

name: Moong Chilla Platter
instructions: Cook moong chillas topped with paneer; plate with chutney and salad.

name: Masala Omelette with Toast
instructions: Make a masala omelette with veggies and cheese; serve with multigrain toast.

name: Shakshuka
instructions: Poach eggs in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce; serve from the pan.

name: Egg & Avocado Toast
instructions: Top toast with smashed avocado and a soft-cooked egg; season with pepper.

name: Chicken Keema Paratha
instructions: Stuff parathas with spiced chicken keema; roast and serve with curd.

name: Masala Corn Chaat
instructions: Toss warm sweet corn with onion, tomato, lemon and chaat masala.

name: Light Sprout Bhel
instructions: Mix puffed rice and sprouts with chopped veggies and chutney just before eating.

name: Baked Paneer Pakora
instructions: Coat paneer fingers in spiced besan batter and bake until crisp.

name: Cucumber Raita Cup
instructions: Whisk curd with grated cucumber, roasted cumin and mint.

name: Chicken Tikka Bites
instructions: Pan-grill yogurt-marinated chicken cubes into quick high-protein bites.

name: Baked Fish Fingers
instructions: Coat fish fingers in seasoned semolina and bake until golden.

name: Egg Chaat Cup
instructions: Chop boiled eggs with onion and tomato; toss with chaat masala and lemon.

name: Masala Vegetable Oats
instructions: Saute veggies with spices, add roasted oats and water; cook to a savoury porridge.

name: Rava Vegetable Idli
instructions: Whisk rava with curd and grated veggies; steam in idli moulds until spongy.

name: Vermicelli Vegetable Upma
instructions: Temper mustard and veggies, add roasted vermicelli and water; cook until fluffy.

name: Quinoa Vegetable Upma
instructions: Cook rinsed quinoa with tempered vegetables into a light savoury upma.

name: Adai (Mixed Lentil Dosa)
instructions: Grind soaked mixed lentils to a coarse batter; spread thick on a tawa and crisp both sides.

name: Palak Thepla
instructions: Knead flour with pureed spinach and spices; roll and roast soft theplas.

name: Paneer Stuffed Paratha
instructions: Stuff wheat dough with spiced crumbled paneer; roll and roast on a tawa.

name: Khaman Besan Dhokla
instructions: Steam a fermented-style besan batter; temper with mustard and curry leaves.

name: Oats Moong Cheela
instructions: Blend soaked moong dal with oats into a batter; cook thin cheelas on a tawa.

name: Peanut Poha
instructions: Temper onion and peanuts, fold in rinsed poha with turmeric; finish with lemon.

name: Light Ven Pongal
instructions: Pressure-cook moong dal with millet; temper with pepper, cumin and ginger.

name: Sweet Potato Sprout Chaat
instructions: Toss steamed sweet potato cubes with sprouts, onion and chaat masala.

name: Akuri (Parsi Scrambled Eggs)
instructions: Scramble eggs softly with onion, tomato, ginger and chilli, Parsi-style.

name: Masala Cheese Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs with chopped veggies; cook into an omelette and melt in cheese.

name: Aloo Gobi Masala
instructions: Saute potato and cauliflower with onion-tomato masala until tender.

name: Matar Paneer
instructions: Simmer paneer and peas in a smooth onion-tomato gravy.

name: Masoor Dal Tadka
instructions: Cook masoor dal soft; finish with a garlic-cumin tadka.

name: Kala Chana Masala
instructions: Pressure-cook soaked kala chana; simmer in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.

name: Methi Matar Malai
instructions: Cook methi and peas in a mild cashew-milk gravy.

name: Gatte Ki Sabzi
instructions: Steam besan gatte; simmer in a tangy curd gravy (no onion/garlic).

name: Veg Kolhapuri
instructions: Cook mixed veggies in a spicy roasted-coconut Kolhapuri masala.

name: Cabbage Peas Sabzi
instructions: Stir-fry shredded cabbage with peas, cumin and turmeric until just tender.

name: Kerala Egg Roast
instructions: Roast boiled eggs in a thick caramelised onion masala, Kerala-style.

name: Egg Cauliflower Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble eggs, stir-fry veggies and riced cauliflower with soy; toss together.

name: Lauki Kofta Curry
instructions: Bake lauki-besan koftas; simmer briefly in an onion-tomato gravy.

name: Broccoli Almond Soup
instructions: Simmer broccoli with garlic and almonds; blend smooth with a little milk.

name: Mushroom Peas Masala
instructions: Saute mushrooms and peas; simmer in an onion-tomato masala.

name: Palak Tofu
instructions: Blanch and puree spinach; cook with onion-garlic base and fold in tofu.

name: Zucchini Paneer Stir Fry
instructions: Sear paneer; toss with zucchini and peppers in garlic and herbs.

name: Quinoa Vegetable Khichdi
instructions: Pressure-cook quinoa and moong dal with veggies into a soft khichdi.

name: Paneer Stuffed Tomatoes
instructions: Hollow tomatoes; stuff with spiced paneer and bake until soft.

name: Mixed Veg Tofu Curry
instructions: Simmer tofu and mixed vegetables in a light onion-tomato curry.

name: Chana Saag (Chickpea Spinach)
instructions: Cook chickpeas in a spinach-onion gravy until thick.

name: Paneer Bhuna Masala
instructions: Bhuna onion-tomato masala until dry; toss in paneer and peppers.

name: Veg Egg Drop Soup
instructions: Swirl beaten egg into a simmering garlic-veg broth for ribbons.

name: Masala Egg Roast
instructions: Pan-roast boiled eggs in a peppery onion-tomato masala until coated.

name: Ragi Roti
instructions: Knead ragi flour with warm water; pat into rotis and roast. Calcium-rich.

name: Oats Roti
instructions: Mix oats and wheat flour; knead and roast into soft rotis.

name: Coconut Rice
instructions: Toss cooked rice with a coconut, mustard and curry-leaf tempering.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
instructions: Grill seasoned chicken; slice over crisp salad with a lemon-olive dressing.

name: Chicken Vegetable Soup
instructions: Simmer shredded chicken with vegetables and garlic into a clear soup.

name: Fish Coconut Curry
instructions: Simmer fish in a light coconut-milk curry with curry leaves.
